TI Processing hydrocarbon feedstock such as methane            and carbon dioxide, involves contacting hydrocarbon            feedstock with doped ceria-supported metal catalyst            comprising active metal and mixed oxide support, for            generating syngas product comprising hydrogen and            carbon monoxide.
AU BRAEDT D
   MIAO J
   HORNER R
   HOLLES J
   ZHOU J
AE UNIV WYOMING (UYWO-C)
GA 2022C9105S
AB    NOVELTY - Processing a hydrocarbon feedstock involves                contacting the hydrocarbon feedstock with a doped                ceria-supported metal catalyst comprising an active                metal and a mixed oxide support, for generating a                syngas product comprising hydrogen (H2) and carbon                monoxide (CO). The feedstock comprises methane with                one or more additional hydrocarbon components and                carbon dioxide (CO2).
   USE - Method for processing a hydrocarbon                feedstock.
   ADVANTAGE - The doped ceria-supported metal catalysts                exhibit good activity and stability for                commercially relevant dry reforming of methane                process conditions including long-term operation.                The catalysts and process are compatible with a                variety of hydrocarbon feedstocks. The ability to                process mixed feedstocks provides flexibility with                respect to a wide range of the industrial                applications that the present catalysts and process                may be effectively integrated.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - Processing a hydrocarbon feedstock involves                contacting the hydrocarbon feedstock with a doped                ceria-supported metal catalyst of formula                (M/Ce1-xB'xO2-&#948;), comprising an active                metal and a mixed oxide support, for generating a                syngas product comprising hydrogen (H2) and carbon                monoxide (CO). M=metals selected from Ni, Co, Pd,                Rh, and Pt or a mixture; B'=dopants selected from                Ti, Zr, Mn, and La; x=0.05 to 0.5; and delta                (&#948;)=represents oxygen deficiency.
   An INDEPENDENT CLAIM is included for a                catalyst comprising a doped ceria-supported metal                of formula M/Ce1-xB'xO2-&#948;.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - INORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Conditions: The doped catalyst                  support maintains the structure of pure ceria and                  produces mixed metal oxides. The one or more                  metals (M) are provided as particles or clusters                  having an average size dimension up to 1 micron.                  Preferred Compositions: The one or more metals                  (M) in doped ceria-supported metal catalyst is                  nickel (Ni), and the catalyst comprises 2.0-3.0                  wt.% nickel. The one or more dopants (B') in                  formula is titanium (Ti), and the ratio of Ce to                  Ti is selected form the range of 2.0 to 2.7.                  Preferred Conditions: The mixed feedstock is                  brought in contact with a doped ceria-supported                  metal catalyst at 600-800&#176;C. The method                  has methane conversion efficiency equal to or                  greater than 70% at a temperature of                  650&#176;C or greater, ethane conversion                  efficiency equal to or greater than 70% at a                  temperature of 650&#176;C or greater, propane                  conversion efficiency equal to or greater than                  90% at a temperature of 750&#176;C or                  greater. The ratio of H2 produced to CO produced                  equal to or greater than 90% at a temperature of                  650&#176;C or greater.

PN CN114591634-A
TI Preparing activated calcium carbonate for PVC            pipes, involves mixing calcium carbonate powder and            water, transferring obtained slurry to dispersing            double spheres, adjusting pH, rotating dispersing            double spheres while introducing carbon dioxide and            dispersant, and heating with modified activator.
AU KONG S
AE JIANGSU ZHILE PIPE IND TECHNOLOGY CO LTD (JIAN-Non-standard)
GA 202280643E
AB    NOVELTY - Preparing activated calcium carbonate for PVC                pipes, comprises (1) mixing calcium carbonate                powder with particle size of &#8804; 100 nm and                water uniformly to obtain calcium carbonate slurry                with weight concentration of 30%, (2) transferring                the calcium carbonate slurry to dispersing double                spheres, and adding pH adjuster to the calcium                carbonate slurry to control the pH value at 8, (3)                starting the dispersing double spheres to rotate                and introducing carbon dioxide at the same time,                and slowly adding dispersant to obtain calcium                carbonate emulsion, (4) keeping the action of                dispersing double spheres unchanged, then adding                modified activator, and heating dispersing double                spheres at 75 &#8451; for 30-60 minutes to                obtain calcium carbonate activated material, and                (5) pouring out the calcium carbonate activated                material, filtering, and drying to remove moisture                to obtain activated ultrafine calcium                carbonate.
   USE - The method is useful for preparing activated                calcium carbonate for PVC pipes.
   ADVANTAGE - The method: adopts dispersing double spheres,                which maintains dynamic dispersion state by                rotation and magnetic field application to realize                dispersion of calcium carbonate and improve the                agglomeration phenomenon of calcium carbonate;                utilizes dispersant to further deepen the                dispersion effect; ensures better activation                effect; has short preparation time, and improved                preparation efficiency; and produces activated and                modified ultrafine calcium carbonate with improved                quality when compared to the existing method.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - INORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Method: In the step (3), the                  dispersant is sodium polyacrylate, the sodium                  polyacrylate accounts for 12% of the total weight                  of the calcium carbonate powder, and the dripping                  time is 5-10 minutes.Preferred Components: In the step (2), the                  pH adjuster is tartaric acid. In the step (4),                  the modified activator is lauric acid, and lauric                  acid accounts for 2.5% of the total weight of the                  calcium carbonate powder.
   TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - INSTRUMENTATION AND TESTING - Preferred Components: The dispersing double                  spheres include outer hollow ball, inner hollow                  ball, air inlet pipe, feeding pipe and rotating                  base. The outer hollow ball is mounted on the                  upper end of the rotating base, the inner hollow                  ball is installed on the inner side of the outer                  hollow ball, the air inlet pipe and the feeding                  pipe are both installed at the upper end of the                  outer hollow ball, so the air inlet pipe                  penetrates the outer hollow ball and communicates                  with the inner hollow ball, and the feeding pipe                  communicates with the outer hollow ball. Multiple                  middle ferromagnetic balls are distributed in an                  annular array and arranged at the center between                  the outer hollow ball and the inner hollow ball,                  and elastic straps are fixedly connected between                  the upper and lower ends of the middle                  ferromagnetic ball and the outer hollow ball. The                  inner hollow ball includes main ball, inner                  extension column and multiple electromagnets,                  where the inner extension column is installed on                  the inner side of the main ball, and the                  electromagnet is evenly mounted on the inner                  extension column and corresponds to the middle                  ferromagnetic ball. The main ball is provided                  with multiple evenly distributed horn holes,                  where the diameter of the horn holes gradually                  increases from the inside to the outside,                  gas-stopping magnetic balls are movably embedded                  in the horn holes, and the gas-stopping magnetic                  balls outer diameter is smaller than the maximum                  inner diameter of the horn hole and larger than                  the minimum diameter of the horn hole, an air                  overflow net is fixedly connected to the inner                  opening of the horn hole, multiple evenly                  distributed elastic support pads are fixedly                  connected between gas-stopping magnetic ball and                  the air overflow net, a waterproof and breathable                  membrane is fixedly connected to the outer                  opening of the horn hole, and the waterproof and                  breathable membrane is closely attached to the                  gas-stopping magnetic ball. The gas-stopping                  magnetic ball includes central core portion,                  magnetic absorbing end and gas-stopping end,                  where the magnetic absorbing end and the                  gas-stopping end are symmetrically connected to                  the both ends of the central core portion, and                  the magnetic absorbing end is located on the side                  of the central core portion close to the air                  overflow net. The central core portion is made of                  hard material, the gas-stopping end is made of                  elastic material, the coverage area is larger                  than that of the waterproof and breathable                  membrane, and the magnetic absorbing end is made                  of ferromagnetic material.

   ADVANTAGE - The whole cleaning process is simple, ensures                that the chip is cleaned, and does not cause the                aluminum metal of the chip to surface                corroded
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - An INDEPENDENT CLAIM is included for a chip                cleaning method.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a schematic view of the                chip cleaning device.

PT P
PN CN114231686-A; CN114231686-B
TI Method for slag free smelting under condition of converter dry dust removing process, involves adopting low-lance oxygen blowing for molten pool stirring, adding dolomite, magnesium ball and lime, and monitoring carbon dioxide concentration.
AU LI Y
   HUAI Q
   WU F
   WU S
   LI S
   LIU Q
   MAN X
AE SHANDONG IRON & STEEL GROUP YONGFENG ZIB (SHAN-Non-standard)
GA 202249398B
AB    NOVELTY - The method comprises (i) opening oxygen lance to nitrogen, continuously blowing for 4-7 seconds, closing the nitrogen and immediately opening oxygen and igniting and executing automatic blowing mode, (ii) adopting low-lance oxygen blowing for molten pool stirring, adding slagging material for 2.5 minutes, firstly adding dolomite and magnesium ball, finally adding lime, (iii) monitoring carbon dioxide (CO) concentration and performing gun sliding operation, (iv) recovering gun position of the oxygen lance to normal gun position, where gun position uses constant gun swing operation, (v) when the furnace slag surface is high, opening the slag, blowing nitrogen at a position of the oxygen lance 5-5.5 m away from liquid level, when beating, there is red smoke from furnace opening, and slag particles are folded to lift the gun and (vi) reducing oxygen lance position to 2.5-3 m from the liquid level, where slag splashing time is 2-3 minutes.
   USE - Method for smelting slag with little slag under condition of converter dry dust removing technique.
   ADVANTAGE - The method smelts slag with little slag under the condition of converter dry dust removing technique.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a flow chart of the method for slag-free smelting under the condition of dry dust removing of converter. (Drawing includes non-English language text).

PT P
PN US2022082092-A1
TI Method for operating liquid air energy storage (LAES), involves recovering waste energy of primer mover's exhaust and cold thermal energy of stored air for dehydrating exhaust and capturing carbon dioxide component formed by natural gas (NG).
AU SINATOV S
AE SINATOV S (SINA-Individual)
   NEWPOLYGEN TECHNOLOGIES LTD (NEWP-Non-standard)
GA 202239835B
AB    NOVELTY - The method involves using a unit of a cold thermal energy derived from re-gasifying liquid air for cryogenic cooling a dehydrated and depressurized liquid air energy storage (LAES) exhaust. A carbon dioxide component is formed by a natural gas (NG) burning in a fueled prime mover, which is de-sublimated and separated. A cooled decarbonized LAES exhaust is formed, where an amount of the LABS on-demand power is dependent on the type of the fueled prime mover and is increased through selecting a supercharged reciprocating internal combustion engine (RICE).
   USE - Method for operating a liquid air energy storage (LAES) in an electric grid of a base-load fossil fuel-fired and nuclear power plants around the clock.
   ADVANTAGE - The method enables to operate a liquid air energy storage that ensures the on-demand and reliable supply of electricity by the intermittent renewable energy sources and provides a stable and efficient operation of the base-load fossil fuel-fired and nuclear power plants around the clock.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a schematic view of interplay of the facilities, equipment, and utilities used for operation of the liquid air energy storage (LAES).
   Pre-treatment unit (402)
   Discharged air recovery package (600)
   LAES facility (1000)
   Electrical grid (2000)
   Co-located LNG plant (4000)
